title: cyperus procerus
intro: Cyperus procerus, also known as the dwarf papyrus or small-flowered flatsedge, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cyperus procerus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
